{{Quote|The Yuuzhan Vong name for this—ship, station, creature, what you will—translates as "seedship". I suppose a biologist might call it an ecospheric blastoderm. This is an egg that will give birth to an entire world.|[[Vergere]] to [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Traitor">''[[The New Jedi Order: Traitor]]''</ref>}}
The '''Sh'rip Sh'pa''', translated into [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] as '''seedship''', was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] that carried supplies and equipment needed for [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongforming]] captured [[Planet/Legends|worlds]].

==Characteristics==
Each vessel was built like an enormous gemstone, and its facets were a dozen [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in size. The [[Yaret-Kor|yaret-kor]] could be moved to different fire-arcs, thanks to the faceted construction of the vessel.

{{Ship-stub}}
